'''lanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:iridescently|iridescently]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iridescently|iridescently]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lanate|lanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lanatesher|lanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lanatesherĂ«m|lanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lanatero|lanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lanateshĂ«|lanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lanateshĂ«m|lanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilanatero|gokilanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilanateshĂ«|gokilanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilanateshĂ«m|gokilanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golanankerom|golanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golanankeshĂ«|golanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golanankeshĂ«m|golanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golanankeya|golanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lanaterom|lanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lanatemu|lanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lanateya|lanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilanaterom|gokilanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilanatemu|gokilanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilanateya|gokilanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lananate|lananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lananatesher|lananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lananatesherĂ«m|lananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lananatero|lananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lananateshĂ«|lananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lananateshĂ«m|lananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilananatero|gokilananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilananateshĂ«|gokilananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilananateshĂ«m|gokilananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golananankerom|golananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golananankeshĂ«|golananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golananankeshĂ«m|golananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golananankeya|golananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lananaterom|lananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lananatemu|lananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lananateya|lananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilananaterom|gokilananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilananatemu|gokilananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilananateya|gokilananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠte|lĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠtesher|lĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠtero|lĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠnĂŠtero|gokilĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠnĂŠnkerom|golĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠnĂŠnkeya|golĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠterom|lĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠtemu|lĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠnĂŠteya|lĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠnĂŠterom|gokilĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠnĂŠteya|gokilĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafnafte|lafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafnaftesher|lafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafnaftesherĂ«m|lafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafnaftero|lafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafnafteshĂ«|lafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafnafteshĂ«m|lafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafnaftero|gokilafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafnafteshĂ«|gokilafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafnafteshĂ«m|gokilafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafnafnkerom|golafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafnafnkeshĂ«|golafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafnafnkeshĂ«m|golafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafnafnkeya|golafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafnafterom|lafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafnaftemu|lafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafnafteya|lafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafnafterom|gokilafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafnaftemu|gokilafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafnafteya|gokilafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
